title: samples_genomewide_het_v1 — per-sample genome-wide heterozygosity row
description: One row per sample (n=226 in the C. gariepinus hatchery cohort). Genome-wide H is derived from a folded 1-D site frequency spectrum produced by ANGSD + realSFS (see catfish-diversity-analysis/docs/methods/MODULE_3_methods.md §A02 'Per-sample heterozygosity estimation'). Feeds the H column of the per-sample master table (S1 in the legacy carve) and the single-cohort boxplot.

sample.description: CGA-prefixed sample identifier (e.g. 'CGA009'). Matches the canonical 226-sample bamlist.

het_genomewide.description: Genome-wide heterozygosity H = sfs_bin1 / (sfs_bin0 + sfs_bin1). Derived from the folded 1-D SFS.

n_sites_sfs.description: Total callable sites contributing to the SFS (sfs_bin0 + sfs_bin1, before filtering).

sfs_bin0.description: Expected count of monomorphic sites under the folded SFS (i.e., reference-state sites). Real number because realSFS returns ML expectations, not integer counts.

sfs_bin1.description: Expected count of singleton (heterozygous) sites under the folded SFS. Real number because realSFS returns ML expectations.
